oci-cache-backup
****************


Description
===========

Use the OCI Cache CLI to create and manage clusters. A cluster is a
memory-based storage solution. For more information, see OCI Cache.


Available Commands
==================

* oci-cache-backup

  * change-compartment

  * create

  * delete

  * export-oci-cache-backup-to-object-storage

  * get

  * update

* oci-cache-backup-summary

  * list-oci-cache-backups
